nasb.text: The doorposts of the nave were square; as for the front of the sanctuary, the appearance of one doorpost was like that of the other.

esv.text: The doorposts of the nave were squared, and in front of the Holy Place was something resembling

cnv.text: 外殿的門框是正方形的；在至聖所前面的門框，也是一樣。

ccb.text: 圣所的门框是方形的，至圣所前的门框也一样。
